0.q: Notably, greater Na+ accumulation in vacuoles of cortex and endodermis was evidenced in the SchMON1 genotype.

1.q: co-expression of SchMON1/SchCCZ1 reduced ROS levels and increased endocytic activity, and number of acidic structures associated with autophagosomes

2.q: co-expression of SchMON1/SchCCZ1 reduced ROS levels and increased endocytic activity, and number of acidic structures associated with autophagosomes

3.q: root cells of transgenic plants showed higher rate of endocytosis under normal growth conditions and higher accumulation of sodium in vacuoles and small vesicular structures under salt stress than wild type.

4.q: co‐expression of SchMON1/SchCCZ1 reduced ROS levels and increased endocytic activity, and number of acidic structures associated with autophagosomes

5.q: co‐expression of SchMON1/SchCCZ1 reduced ROS levels and increased endocytic activity, and number of acidic structures associated with autophagosomes

6.q: higher accumulation of sodium in vacuoles and small vesicular structures under salt stress than wild type

7.q: the capacity of SchRabGDI1 to interact with RabGTPase was demonstrated through BiFC assays.

8.q: the root cells of transgenic plants showed higher rate of endocytosis under normal growth conditions
